hypothesis: Fine-tuning the eSEN surrogate with a stress-balanced loss on no more than 500 DFT-labeled strained configurations per material (±5% volumetric and shear strains) will reduce stress mean absolute error by at least 50% and cut VASP-restart SSNEB iterations by at least 30% for CsPbI3 β↔γ and TiO2-B↔anatase transitions, while keeping final DFT-refined energy barriers within 0.05 eV of VASP-only baselines.
